message:
fix(runtime): Fix exception cause tracking and comptime issues

- Fix thread-local storage for exception cause to avoid stack lifetime
  issues by storing data directly instead of pointers
- Add setExceptionCauseFromData for cases without full PyException
- Fix PyException.init to use direct struct initialization (avoid
  calling getCurrentExceptionId at comptime)
- Update raise statement codegen to use new cause tracking API
- Add assertIsInstance handler for type assertions
